normalize_media.description: Whether or not normalize voicemail audio file

should_restrict_access_to_owner.description: When true, API access to a voicemail box (and messages) is restricted to admins and the owner of the box

should_restrict_access_to_unowned.description: When true, API access to an unowned voicemail box (and messages) is restricted to admins

transcribe_format.description: Voicemail message format needed for transcription
